package.name: delivery_localization
package.description: Localization and coordinate-frame infrastructure for the campus delivery robot. Owner: Member 3. Contains two ROS nodes: - gps_simulator_node : simulates a NEO-style GPS fix from the Gazebo ground truth and publishes NavSatFix. - map_tf_broadcaster_node : publishes a static transform from /map to /odom and exposes a "set initial pose" service for the AMCL localizer (used by the navigation stack).
